studyName: Acquired Copy Number Alterations in Adult Acute Myeloid Leukemia Genomes

variables.name: %BM Blast @ diagnosis
variables.description: What percentage of myeloblasts were present in the bone marrow at the time of diagnosis?

variables.name: %PB Blast
variables.description: What percentage of blasts were present in the peripheral blood at diagnosis?

variables.name: Abnormal/Total Cells (Clone 2)
variables.description: # of abnormal cells in clone 2/total cells evaluated  (if applicable)
